final_prompt.prompt:

Text (verbatim): must include concept names and definitions for: AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, иТЄй¶П, CLI
Constraints: must preserve all 7 concepts with their relationships clearly visualized, must be visually intuitive for beginners
Avoid:
